//: Plugin-level hooks, active wherever the spec-to-pr plugin is installed. The UserPromptSubmit nudge is the local parallel to the CI-only setup/hooks/force-agentic-loop.sh: it detects spec-shaped prompts and steers Claude to invoke Skill(spec-to-pr:agentic-loop) before defaulting to plan mode / brainstorming. It is a NUDGE, never a block, no-ops in CI, and can be disabled with AGENTIC_LOOP_NO_NUDGE=1. The per-repo gate/context hooks are NOT here — they need $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR and are registered per-repo (see skills/agentic-loop/setup/SETUP.md).
